title: Creamy Mushroom and Garlic Fritters
description: A French-inspired dish that combines sautéed mushrooms and garlic in a crispy fritter. Serve hot with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: 1. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the mushroom and garlic until softened.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the flour and a pinch of salt.
3. Add the flour mixture to the pan with the mushroom and garlic, stirring to combine.
4. Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the pan, flattening slightly.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
